title: senecio tabidus
intro: Senecio tabidus, also known as the "Wilted Daisy", is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its delicate white petals and yellow centers. Traditionally, the leaves of Senecio tabidus have been used in herbal medicine for their expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's medicinal properties also include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Senecio tabidus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
